basics.name: Aabid Basha Shaik
basics.title: DevOps Engineer | AWS | Kubernetes | Terraform | CI/CD | GitOps
basics.summary: I build the infrastructure that lets engineering teams ship faster, safer, and at scale. As a DevOps Engineer at Uber, I architected cloud development environments (DevPods) used by over 10,000 engineers — cutting onboarding time by 94% and AWS spend by 25%, all while maintaining 99.9% uptime. Before that, I spent 3+ years at L&T Technology Services leading platform bring-up for Qualcomm chipsets, managing complex hardware-software integration from silicon to flashable firmware. My sweet spot is where automation meets reliability: designing Terraform-based multi-environment infrastructure, building CI/CD pipelines that reduce deployment failures, and shipping GitOps workflows with Argo CD and Kubernetes on EKS.

bullets: Driving developer productivity and cloud reliability at one of the world's most demanding engineering orgs.
Architected AWS-based DevPod infrastructure serving 10,000+ engineers, slashing environment onboarding time by 94%
Designed reusable Terraform modules for multi-environment provisioning — improving deployment consistency and security posture across teams
Built end-to-end CI/CD pipelines that reduced deployment failures by 35% and boosted release velocity by 40%
Deployed containerized workloads to Amazon EKS using Helm charts; implemented GitOps workflows with Argo CD
Stood up Prometheus/Grafana observability stack, cutting mean time to detect (MTTD) incidents by 50%
Optimized Auto Scaling policies, trimming AWS cloud spend by 25% while sustaining 99.9% uptime SLA
Enforced DevSecOps practices including IAM least-privilege access and automated vulnerability scanning pipelines
Led end-to-end platform bring-up for next-generation Qualcomm chipsets, bridging hardware engineering and software delivery.
Drove hardware-software integration for new Qualcomm chipset platforms from silicon bring-up to production-ready firmware
Managed Qualcomm code import workflows into SOMC mirror branches; resolved complex merge conflicts across integration and mainline branches
Built integrated code pipelines to produce validated, flashable device images for deployment and field testing
Executed base-up operations from mainline to local integration branches, maintaining code integrity across release cycles
Owned full Git lifecycle: branch creation, manifest setup, tagging, merging, and source control governance across teams

achievements.context: Cut environment onboarding time by architecting AWS-based DevPod infrastructure serving 10,000+ engineers.
Trimmed AWS cloud spend by optimizing Auto Scaling policies.
Reduced deployment failures by building end-to-end CI/CD pipelines.
Cut mean time to detect (MTTD) incidents by standing up Prometheus/Grafana observability stack.
